name: Buddha Jayanti
traditions: Visiting Lumbini (Buddha's birthplace); meditation retreats; temple decorations; chanting sutras; offering alms; releasing caged animals.
historicalBackground: Buddha Jayanti specifically celebrates the birth of Siddhartha Gautama in Lumbini, Nepal, around 563 BCE. It is especially significant in Theravada countries.
description: The celebration of the Buddha's birth at Lumbini, Nepal, with pilgrimages, meditation, and acts of compassion across the Buddhist world.
